description: collections_search — FamilySearch record collections for Denmark (Thisted/Stagstrup queries resolve to Denmark scope). Includes the military levying rolls (lægdsruller) collection alongside church, census, and probate.

results.title: Denmark, Church Books, 1484-1941
results.notes: Parish registers (kirkebøger): baptisms, confirmations, marriages, burials. Indexing coverage varies sharply by parish and period; many rural volumes are browse-only.

results.title: Denmark, Military Levying Rolls (Lægdsruller), 1789-1861
results.notes: Conscription registers listing males from birth or early childhood under the father's name, tracked across annual/triennial sessions by levying district (lægd).

results.title: Denmark Census, 1787-1930
results.notes: National censuses beginning 1787 and 1801 — household composition with ages and relationships.

results.title: Denmark, Probate Indexes, 1674-1851
results.notes: Skifteprotokoller (estate/probate) indexes by district; originals mostly browse-only images.
